---
description: "Use when editing README, docs, or markdown deliverables. Covers setup instructions, repository handoff notes, and customer-facing mock documentation."
applyTo: ["README.md", "docs/**/*.md"]
---

# Documentation Guidelines

- Write setup and handoff documentation in clear Japanese unless the user asks for another language.
- Keep README focused on project purpose, setup, validation, CI/CD, and deliverables.
- Include executable commands for setup, development, lint, and build when documenting environment preparation.
- When documenting GitHub Pages, use placeholder URLs unless a confirmed repository URL exists.
- For work reports, describe how the single day was used in a concise, chronological order.
